empleos.descripcion: Mindrift is looking for skilled Full-Stack Web App Developers (JavaScript/TypeScript + Python or Node) to join the Tendem project (https://tendem.ai/) and build interactive browser-based applications within our hybrid AI + human environment. In this role, as an AI Pilot - that's how we refer to this position at Mindrift - you'll collaborate with Tendem Agents that handle repetitive tasks, while you provide full-stack engineering expertise, architectural judgment, and quality control to ensure web apps are functional, robust, and ready for real users. This part-time remote opportunity is ideal for professionals with hands-on experience in modern frontend frameworks, backend APIs, databases, and shipping interactive web products end-to-end. What We Do The Mindrift platform connects specialists with AI projects from major tech innovators. Our mission is to unlock the potential of Generative AI by tapping into real-world expertise from across the globe. About The Role This is a freelance role for a Tendem project. As a Full-Stack Web App Developer, you'll design, build, and refine browser-based applications with real logic, state, persistence, and user input — from habit trackers and budgeting tools to internal dashboards, mini-SaaS tools, and AI-powered apps. You may also work on standalone Python applications and data-processing scripts that sit alongside or behind these products. Key Responsibilities Build interactive web applications with frontend (React, Next.js, Vue, or similar) and a backend API (Python/FastAPI/Flask or Node/Express) Design and implement data models, schemas, and persistence layers using SQL (PostgreSQL, SQLite) or NoSQL stores Implement authentication, sessions, and basic role-based access where needed Integrate third-party APIs and AI/LLM services

Buena comunicación escrita y oral, orientación al trabajo en equipo y atención al detalle en la calidad del código. Valorable: experiencia previa en entornos remotos, metodologías ágiles (Scrum, Kanban) y buenas prácticas de testing automatizado.

empleos.titulo: Software Engineer Full Stack & AI First
empleos.descripcion: En Homie estamos transformando la forma en que las personas rentan vivienda en LATAM. No somos un portal de anuncios: administramos la renta de principio a fin en representación de los propietarios desde la captación y las visitas hasta el contrato, la gestión de la renta y la dispersión a los dueños. Después de casi diez años operando, estamos modernizando y reconstruyendo el núcleo de nuestra tecnología sobre bases AI-first: sistemas simples, bien probados y altamente apalancados en IA, capaces de operar todo el ciclo de renta con velocidad y calidad. Buscamos a alguien que construya con criterio: que use la IA como multiplicador real no como autocompletado, que sepa exactamente qué no construir y que se obsesione con la simplicidad, la calidad y los datos limpios. Si te emociona resolver problemas de negocio reales con apalancamiento de IA y tener impacto directo en un producto que mueve el mercado, queremos conocerte. Misión del rol Diseñar y construir con alto apalancamiento de IA, un núcleo de software simple, robusto y bien probado que habilite una mejor experiencia para propietarios, inquilinos y equipos internos, y que pueda evolucionar rápido sin acumular complejidad ni deuda. Tu trabajo no es solo escribir código: es construir los sistemas, las barreras de calidad y la observabilidad que permiten al equipo y a la IA entregar rápido y con confianza. Elevas el estándar técnico, mantienes los datos como activo central del negocio y aseguras que todo lo que sale a producción esté probado, sea reproducible y aporte valor real. Tareas Construir de punta a punta (full-stack), diseñas e implementas funcionalidades completas del ciclo de renta de la base de datos a la interfaz, con ownership end-to-end y comodidad para moverte por todo el stack. empleos.descripcion: Company Description Talan – Positive Innovation Talan is an international consulting group specializing in innovation and business transformation through technology. With over 7,200 consultants in 21 countries and a turnover of €850M, we are committed to delivering impactful, future-ready solutions. Talan at a Glance Headquartered in Paris and operating globally, Talan combines technology, innovation, and empowerment to deliver measurable results for our clients. Over the past 22 years, we’ve built a strong presence in the IT and consulting landscape, and we’re on track to reach €1 billion in revenue this year. Our Core Areas of Expertise Data & Technologies: We design and implement large-scale, end-to-end architecture and data solutions, including data integration, data science, visualization, Big Data, AI, and Generative AI. Cloud & Application Services: We integrate leading platforms such as SAP, Salesforce, Oracle, Microsoft, AWS, and IBM Maximo, helping clients transition to the cloud and improve operational efficiency. Management & Innovation Consulting: We lead business and digital transformation initiatives through project and change management best practices (PM, PMO, Agile, Scrum, Product Ownership), and support domains such as Supply Chain, Cybersecurity, and ESG/Low-Carbon strategies. We work with major global clients across diverse sectors, including Transport & Logistics, Financial Services, Energy & Utilities, Retail, and Media & Telecommunications. empleos.descripcion: Web Developer (WordPress & CRO Focus) Project-Based | Remote | Flexible Schedule About Talent Global Talent Global connects exceptional remote professionals with fast-growing international companies. We specialize in helping businesses build high-performing teams across marketing, operations, creative, and technology. We're looking for a Web Developer to redesign and optimize our company website, creating a more modern, professional, and conversion-focused experience that supports our business growth. About the Role This is a project-based opportunity for an experienced Web Developer who can take ownership of redesigning and improving our website from both a technical and user experience perspective. We're looking for someone who understands not only website development, but also how to build pages that convert visitors into qualified leads. You'll be responsible for redesigning and modernizing the Talent Global website to create a more professional, engaging, and conversion-focused experience. This includes improving the overall user journey, showcasing our services, open positions, and client testimonials more effectively, while optimizing the site to increase qualified leads and achieve a target conversion rate of 30% of visitors clicking to book a call. Responsibilities Develop, redesign and modernize the Talent Global website Improve the overall user experience and website structure Develop responsive, mobile-friendly pages Optimize the website for lead generation and conversions (CRO) Improve navigation and presentation of our open positions Create effective layouts for client testimonials and social proof Implement best practices for performance and usability Collaborate with our internal team while working independently Deliver project milestones on time Require

empleos.descripcion: Dedicated to delivering exceptional service and maintaining organized business operations, our company is seeking a detail-oriented Administrative Data Entry File Clerk to join our team. If you excel at managing records, entering data accurately, and working independently in a remote environment, this opportunity may be the perfect fit for you. In this role, you will be responsible for maintaining digital files, updating databases, organizing administrative records, and ensuring information is entered accurately and efficiently. Your attention to detail, reliability, and commitment to data accuracy will play an important role in supporting daily operations and helping our team stay organized and productive. Â Key responsibilities: Â Intake & indexing. Receive files from shared inboxes, portals, internal ticketing tools, and cloud folders. Confirm document type, required fields, signatures, and attachments. Index each record using standard metadata (client/project ID, date, document category, version, region). Â Document organization. Apply standardized naming conventions and folder structures. Convert formats when needed (PDF merge/split, image-to-PDF, compressing, version labeling). Maintain controlled libraries (final vs draft vs archived), including retention tags. Â Quality control Perform daily spot checks for duplicates, misfiles, missing pages, and unreadable scans. Flag exceptions and route them to the correct owner with clear notes. Maintain error logs and contribute to process improvements that reduce rework. Â Records governance & compliance Handle sensitive records with strict access controls and confidentiality. Follow retention schedules, legal hold instructions, and deletion/archival rules. Support audits by pulling records quickly and documenting

empleos.descripcion: At Umpisa Inc., our mission is to make the Philippines be known globally as a tech hub. Umpisa Inc. is a progressive technology services company that partners with select industries, clients and people to work on pioneering and industry-changing solutions via digital transformation, modern software development and venture building. We create a set of world-class and impactful products and solutions to help organizations and individuals live better lives. We offer demanding, challenging and rewarding careers in software development, product development, emerging technologies, and more for the right candidates. Essential Skills: Aligns with our values: Excellence, Integrity, Professionalism, People Success, Customer Success, Fun, Innovation and Diversity Strong communication skills Strong problem solving and analytical skills Excellent problem-solving ability Would like to work as part of a self-organizing Scrum team in a scaled agile framework Must be a self-starter and loves to collaborate with the team and client Job Summary We are looking for a dedicated and customer-focused Help Desk / IT Support Specialist to provide first-level technical support to internal users. The ideal candidate has 2-5 years of IT support experience , strong troubleshooting skills, and a passion for delivering excellent technical assistance while ensuring a positive user experience. Job Title: Frontend Software Engineer Job Type: Contractor Location: Remote Job Summary Frontend Software Engineers to participate in a high-impact customer project, focusing on crafting exceptional user interfaces. In this role, you'll apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems. Your work will shape how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. No prior experience in AI is required — your domain knowledge is what matters. Leverage your ability to interpret detailed component style guides and screenshots, delivering pixel-accurate, responsive web interfaces that set new standards in usability and aesthetics. Strong communication skills are highly valued for effective collaboration and documentation. Scope of Work Interpret and translate component style guides and interface screenshots into precise, visually consistent UI deliverables. Implement pixel-perfect, responsive web components using modern technologies such as Typescript and CSS3. Ensure all UI elements adhere to established design systems and accessibility standards. Collaborate asynchronously through clear documentation and constructive feedback within a remote-first environment. Proactively identify, communicate, and resolve inconsistencies or ambiguities in design specifications. Optimize UI performance across devices, focusing on fast load times and smooth interactions. Contribute domain-specific expertise to guide the training and development of advanced AI models. Preferred Qualifications Minimum of 3 years of professional experience delivering high-quality front-end solutions. Proven proficiency with Typescript, CSS3, and responsive web design principles. Demonstrated success in building pixel-perfect interfaces from detailed visual references. Experienc

Buscamos un/a Desarrollador/a PHP Semi Senior para incorporarse a un equipo de tecnología y participar en el desarrollo, evolución y mantenimiento de aplicaciones web orientadas al negocio. La posición tendrá un rol activo en la implementación de nuevas funcionalidades, el mantenimiento evolutivo y correctivo del portal web, y el desarrollo e integración de APIs, contribuyendo a la mejora continua de las soluciones existentes. Además, será responsable de atender los requerimientos funcionales y técnicos del área, asegurando desarrollos de calidad, escalables y alineados con las necesidades del negocio. Trabajará en conjunto con el equipo técnico bajo metodologías ágiles, colaborando en el análisis, diseño e implementación de soluciones, aportando iniciativas de mejora y participando activamente en un entorno dinámico, colaborativo y orientado a la innovación.

Building the Future of Open Finance Payward - the parent company behind Kraken, NinjaTrader, Breakout, xStocks, Payward Services and CF Benchmarks - has spent the last 15 years building one of the most modern and globally accessible financial infrastructure platforms in the industry, built to advance an open, global financial system. Before you apply, we encourage you to explore our culture page to understand what drives us and how we work. The Team We are currently seeking an experienced Senior Software Engineer to join our growing Payments & Blockchain team to be focused on our payments systems. The Payments & Blockchain team is responsible for the first and last mile of every dollar (digital or fiat) that goes in or out of Kraken. Join our Payments team to help integrate Kraken’s systems with an ever-expanding universe of payment providers. As a member of this team, your focus is on protecting client funds. You will be responsible for building systems that communicate with various blockchains to enable the timely processing of client transactions, while also ensuring the safety and security of all funds on the exchange. The Opportunity Design, develop, and maintain high-quality payment processing systems using React.js and other relevant technologies Build and refine seamless transaction experiences that optimize fund transfers for speed, security, and reliability Ensure an efficient and intuitive onboarding experience for users interacting with payment systems, reducing friction and improving trust Develop innovative features that enhance engagement, retention, and loyalty within the payments ecosystem Set the standard for high-quality, secure code and lead the development of complex financial software systems Influence technical decisions, contribute to strategy di

Next.js Developer 📍 Remote (Argentina-based candidates only) 🗣 Fluent English Required 📅 Minimum 4 years of experience Company Overview CodingIT is a fast-growing software development company delivering scalable, high-quality digital solutions for clients in the U.S. market. We work on complex, real-world products where strong engineering practices, ownership, and technical excellence matter. As part of our growth, we offer a clearly defined career path that allows experienced engineers to progressively take on greater technical ownership and leadership responsibilities, including opportunities to evolve into Tech Lead roles over time. Role Overview As a Next.js Developer at CodingIT, you will own the development and continuous improvement of high-performing websites and digital experiences built primarily with Next.js and TypeScript. The role combines hands-on engineering with close collaboration with marketing, design, and business stakeholders. You will work independently alongside the Marketing team or under the supervision of a Digital Experience Manager. We are looking for a self-sufficient, proactive, and dynamic developer who can translate business and marketing needs into reliable technical solutions, manage priorities with limited supervision, and take ownership from implementation through deployment and monitoring. Experience building and maintaining e-commerce websites and working with CMS platforms such as Webflow or WordPress is essential. Key Responsibilities Develop, maintain, and continuously improve websites and digital experiences using Next.js and TypeScript. Apply modern Next.js patterns, including the App Router, server and client components, data fetching, caching, and appropriate rendering strategies. Build reusable, responsive, and accessible us

empleos.descripcion: The salary range for this role is $2,800 - $6,000 per month (Gross in USD) About Sezzle: With a mission to financially empower the next generation, Sezzle is revolutionizing the shopping experience beyond payments, blending cutting-edge tech with seamless, interest-free installment plans that make shopping smarter and more accessible. We’re not just transforming payments; we’re redefining how people discover, interact with, and purchase the things they love while driving real impact on merchant sales through increased conversions and higher order values. As we continue to shape the future of fintech and retail, we’re building an innovative, dynamic team passionate about creating more than just a transaction but a truly unique shopping journey. If you’re excited about pushing boundaries in tech and delivering a game-changing experience for consumers and merchants alike, come join us at Sezzle and help create the future of shopping! Compensation: For this mid-level development role, with 3-7 years of experience, the compensation range is $2,800 - $6,000 USD per month. This range is designed to reflect the skills, experience, and value brought to the team, ensuring competitive and fair pay within the industry. Interview Process We believe transparency is important at Sezzle. Regularly providing feedback while setting expectations is part of our culture starting with the interview process. Advancement through each step is not guaranteed. Application submitted (you are here) Wonderlic test (30-40 min) Coding assessment (:1.5 hours) Interview with recruiters (30 min) Interview with engineers (1 hour) Interview with engineering leadership (30-45 min) Offer!
